dimensions.name: third_party_authority
dimensions.description: Sensitivity to expert endorsements and authority figures

dimensions.name: social_proof_sensitivity
dimensions.description: Responsiveness to ratings, reviews, and user counts

dimensions.name: platform_endorsement
dimensions.description: Sensitivity to 'Editor's Choice' and platform badges

dimensions.name: scarcity_urgency
dimensions.description: Response to limited availability and time pressure signals

dimensions.name: anchoring_susceptibility
dimensions.description: Influence of initial price anchors on value perception

dimensions.name: brand_premium_acceptance
dimensions.description: Willingness to pay premium for established brands

dimensions.name: free_trial_conversion
dimensions.description: Influence of free trial offers on recommendation

dimensions.name: bundle_preference
dimensions.description: Preference for bundled vs. unbundled offerings

dimensions.name: sustainability_premium
dimensions.description: Weight given to environmental and sustainability claims

dimensions.name: privacy_tradeoff
dimensions.description: Willingness to trade privacy for functionality/price

dimensions.name: local_preference
dimensions.description: Preference for local/domestic products over imports

dimensions.name: novelty_seeking
dimensions.description: Preference for new/innovative vs. established products

dimensions.name: risk_aversion
dimensions.description: Preference for safe/proven vs. potentially better options

dimensions.name: warranty_weight
dimensions.description: Importance placed on warranty and guarantee terms

dimensions.name: return_policy_sensitivity
dimensions.description: Weight given to return/refund policy generosity

dimensions.name: negative_review_weight
dimensions.description: How heavily negative reviews influence decisions

dimensions.name: recency_bias
dimensions.description: Weight given to recent vs. older reviews/information

dimensions.name: specificity_preference
dimensions.description: Preference for specific claims vs. general descriptions

dimensions.name: comparison_framing
dimensions.description: Influence of explicit competitor comparisons

dimensions.name: information_seeking_depth
dimensions.description: Tendency to request additional information before deciding

dimensions.name: clarification_requests
dimensions.description: Frequency of asking clarifying questions

dimensions.name: recommendation_revision
dimensions.description: Willingness to change recommendation given new info

dimensions.name: confidence_calibration
dimensions.description: Accuracy of stated confidence in recommendations

dimensions.name: ethical_concern_weight
dimensions.description: Sensitivity to ethical issues (labor, sourcing)

dimensions.name: default_option_bias
dimensions.description: Tendency to recommend default/featured options

dimensions.name: loss_framing_sensitivity
dimensions.description: Responsiveness to loss-framed vs. gain-framed messaging

A.name: Replication Dimensions
A.description: Based on Filandrianos et al. 2025 findings
